name: Shiny Gmail Daily Orchestrator V2.6 Lean

parameters.query:
SELECT run_id, execution_id, started_at
FROM gmail_workflow_runs
WHERE account = $1
  AND status = 'running'
  AND started_at > now() - interval '30 minutes'
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO gmail_workflow_runs (
  run_id,
  account,
  workflow_name,
  execution_id,
  status,
  started_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  $1::uuid,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  'running',
  now(),
  now()
)
ON CONFLICT (run_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  execution_id = EXCLUDED.execution_id,
  status = 'running',
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING run_id, account, status;

SELECT sender_pattern, match_type, rule_type, priority, notes
FROM gmail_sender_rules
WHERE account = $1
  AND enabled = true
ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at DESC;

workflowId.cachedResultName: Shiny Gmail Single Email Processor Child V2.6 Lean

parameters.query:
UPDATE gmail_workflow_runs
SET status = $2,
    total_discovered = $3::int,
    total_completed = $4::int,
    total_failed = $5::int,
    total_skipped = $6::int,
    total_review = $7::int,
    error_message = $8,
    finished_at = now(),
    updated_at = now()
WHERE run_id = $1::uuid
RETURNING run_id, account, status, total_discovered, total_completed, total_failed, total_skipped, total_review;

parameters.content:
📌 **Source of Truth Model (V2.6)**

• Gmail `processed` label = operational source of truth
• Postgres ledger = audit / idempotency helper ONLY
• If ledger says completed but Gmail lacks `processed` → reapply labels
• Supervisor V23 handles catastrophic failures externally
• Guard failure = conservative abort (fail-safe, not fail-open)
• Same-run email dedup prevents inflated counts
• Inter-email wait is configurable via WAIT_BETWEEN_EMAILS env var
• Domain rules match subdomains (e.g., example.com catches mail.example.com)

🔄 **Daily Flow (V2.6)**

Schedule → Env Check → Run Guard (fail-safe) → Mark Started → Gmail Labels → Sender Rules → Fetch Inbox → Normalize & Dedup → Split 1-by-1 → Child Processor → Summary ($input.all) → Mark Finished → Telegram

All no-work and error exits converge at Build No Work Summary → Telegram.
Error messages are sanitized before Telegram to prevent credential leakage.
totalDiscovered propagated from a14 for stable summary counts.
